title: オークスの後に・Full of Joy

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Enveloped in cheers after racing in the Japanese
Oaks, Fine Motion fully embraces the joy of
running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like her joyous performance has
resonated with the Umamusume she spoke to
before the race too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with so many factors motivating other
Umamusume, Fine Motion struggles to accept her
inner instinct to simply race for the fun of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she is grappling with a vague sense of
unease, Fine Motion is still looking forward to
summer camp, after which the Shuka Sho awaits.
